title: Verify Hero section displays correct remaining days
description: Test that the Hero section accurately displays the number of days remaining in the user's trial.
preconditions: User has an active trial with X days remaining
User is on the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner screen
2. Observe the Hero section at the top

expected_result: The text 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining' or similar is displayed, where X is the correct number of days left.
